name: codex-auto-router
description: Routes Codex work to explicitly named, model-pinned Terra, Spark, and Luna custom agents using concrete self-contained delegation briefs with explicit scope, outputs, acceptance criteria, evidence, dependency rules, worktree isolation, fallback handling, and mandatory parent review.

interface.shortDescription: Route concrete work briefs to specialized agents
interface.longDescription: Mention Auto Router and describe only the desired outcome. The Sol or Terra parent gathers the relevant source of truth, creates concrete non-overlapping Delegation Brief v1 contracts, routes exact model-pinned Terra, Spark, and Luna agents, isolates conflicting writes, waits for dependencies, and integrates only evidence-backed accepted results.
defaultPrompt: Analyze this repository with concrete evidence-backed workstream briefs and model-pinned Terra agents plus Spark-first scanners.
Implement this issue by defining exact ownership, acceptance criteria, validation commands, isolated worktrees where needed, and parent review.
Process this large task set in dependency-aware waves; give every named agent a self-contained brief and integrate only accepted results.
